pullMode.message: This GitHub proof does not create PULLS snapshots. It reads AWS EventBridge-generated 15-minute pull history from DynamoDB.

predictions.reason: Market consensus plus movement, book agreement, divergence, reversals, run-line movement, and pull depth.

rolling24hAccuracyTarget.note: The 90% target is measured across all optimized individual game-winner picks in the following rolling 24 hours.

rules: Use the latest odds pull available at gate time.
Attempt SportsDataIO fundamentals closest to first pitch.
If SportsDataIO is unavailable at final gate, block the row from counting as a full-data final pick.
Do not fabricate fundamentals; mark and store the missing-provider failure explicitly.
Re-store the final row so the database reflects the last-gate decision.

rolling24hAccuracyTarget.policy: Every game receives an optimized winner selection. The 90% target is measured by the rolling 24-hour audit over all optimized individual picks.

accuracyTarget.policy: Every game receives an optimized winner selection. The 90% target is measured by the rolling 24-hour audit over all optimized individual picks.

gamesMissingWinnerPrediction: Chicago White Sox at Baltimore Orioles
Detroit Tigers at New York Yankees
New York Mets at Toronto Blue Jays

build.candidateFilterPolicy: Candidates are the post-score subset where frozen=true and selected grade is MLB_STRONG or MLB_LEAN. This full board shows the pre-filter scoring pass for every MLB game.
build.message: MLB-B1.0 refused because frozen same-slate history did not produce 2 MLB_STRONG plus 1 MLB_LEAN/STRONG. Pull coverage is incomplete versus the 1:00 AM ET HOT capture policy. The 2-hour slate build deadline has already passed.

pullCoverage.policy: MLB HOT pull history should start at 1:00 AM ET and continue every 15 minutes.

build.requires: 2 MLB_STRONG + 1 MLB_LEAN_OR_STRONG; zero true COIN_FLIP by default

pullCoverage.policy: MLB HOT pull history should start at 1:00 AM ET and continue every 15 minutes.

results.requires: 2 MLB_STRONG + 1 MLB_LEAN_OR_STRONG; zero true COIN_FLIP by default
results.message: MLB-B1.0 refused because frozen same-slate history did not produce 2 MLB_STRONG plus 1 MLB_LEAN/STRONG. Pull coverage is incomplete versus the 1:00 AM ET HOT capture policy. The 2-hour slate build deadline has already passed.
results.candidateFilterPolicy: Candidates are the post-score subset where frozen=true and selected grade is MLB_STRONG or MLB_LEAN. This full board shows the pre-filter scoring pass for every MLB game.

pullCoverage.policy: All active same-day sports should start timestamped pulls at 1:00 AM ET and continue every 15 minutes.

pullDiagnostics.policy: Every requested sport with active same-day games or matches must have convertible markets for timestamped storage. Diagnostic probes do not create snapshots.
